Policy sidebar

Audit replay exception summary

Summary card that should not survive extraction.

Audit replay matrix

Matrix helper that should not be included in the body.

Audit replay exception matrix

Audit replay exception matrices matter when operators need a precise map for replaying reservation evidence and waiver records after an incident has stabilized.

The guidance covers exception triggers, dashboard checks, and reservation guarantees that should be revalidated before replayed records are accepted.

Teams are expected to compare regional recovery playbooks, reconcile missing snapshots, and confirm queue exports before replaying eligibility decisions.

The matrix also emphasizes attaching replayed audit artifacts to the same recovery record used for incident review and follow-up.
